name: Zach Token
short_description: ZACH - The autonomous AI trading agent's native token on Base. P3 trading profits drive buyback/burn mechanism.
description: ZACH is the native token of the Balvit AI ecosystem. Powered by RIKA, an autonomous AI trading agent operating on XAU/USD and major FX pairs. 3% transfer tax: 50% burn, 33% treasury, 17% LP rewards. Fixed supply, no mint function. P3 trading profits drive continuous buyback and burn, creating real yield backing.
